game.title: Beyond the Veil
game.short_text: Hugo isn’t a cheerful boy, and he’s even less so when it comes to visiting his grandfather, the graveyard keeper.

details.title: Beyond the Veil
details.description:
Beyond the Veil 
Beyond the Veil is a game where you play as Hugo, a rather melancholic boy who visits his grandfather in the countryside. His grandfather is the graveyard keeper, and Hugo will end up helping the ghosts that have made the graveyard their home.
--MADE 10 DAYS for GBJam12---
    
Have fun! 
--- CONTROLS ---
All keyboard controls are based on physical key, so it should work on whateveer keyboard you're using (between bracket is for french keyboard). 

ActionControllerKeyboardMoveLeft Stick / D-PadWASD (or ZQSD)InterractA (Xbox)Q (or A)StartStartSpace

Galdormin: Progamming 
Paraguus: Art
Tchouki: Art
Valenwed: Music

game.title: a cat's death
game.short_text: wanted dead and alive

details.title: a cat's death
details.description:
You're wanted dead AND alive
An alley cat's life isn't always easy. Un-life didn't make it much easier either.
Play through a charming puzzle-platformer as a tiny cat that's been granted big powers, and must now walk the line between dead and alive - all while trying to solve the mysteries of Ghost City, a place where nothing is as it seems.

GBJAM 12 entrant
This game was developed by me as a solo project for the 12th edition of GBJAM! 
The currently available build was developed during the jam, and is a bite-sized taste of things to come. An updated version with bug-fixes and more content is coming soon!

game.short_text: Stealth Platformer about a monster trying to skip their job.

details.title: CastleBreak: Rondo of Booze
details.description:
Being a monster for the Vampire Lord is hard...
Use your wits to try and flee the Castle without being caught by his guards!
How to Play
Avoid being spotted by the "peepers" outside the windows.
some states make allow you to be disguised, like crouching or hanging like a bat!
Controls
Arrow keysUp, Down, Left and Right Down Arrow (on ground)Crouches (Hides the player when not in bat form)Up Arrow (on ar, not gliding, bat form)Shoots up a rope that pulls you towards the ceiling. Hold it to stay hidden upside down.ZA, Confirms in menus, Jump, (when in bat form) hold to gilde.XB

Credits:

Graphics, SFX and CodeZa "rata" FonsecaMusic005 - itch.ioLevel DesignDanilo César
POST-JAM Version with bug-fixes on the making!
Known Issue(s):
For some people the  player's jump isn't high enough to jump two tiles, this can lead you to getting stuck in a hole on the start of the level 2. Please forgive that and restart the page. (You can skip menus/cutscenes by pressing the "A" button (Z on the keyboard).
Also there's a collision problem on at the end of the first cave level that doesn't allow you to go any further, therefore you can't beat the game. Sorry everyone.

game.short_text: a ship-searching, shooting game
game.title: space threnody

details.title: space threnody
details.description:
The scans are complete, and your handler sees just one blip on the radar.
A small spaceship, drifting aimlessly, with a signature that couldn't belong to anyone but her... Right?
Don your gear, grab your weapons, and take up the mantle of Space Lass! as you navigate a spaceship overrun with hostile lifeforms, searching desperately for its pilot: Your best friend... and the one that got away.
space threnody is a first person shooter adventure with atmospheric sci-fi horror sensibilities and sprite-based 3D environments that push portable 8-bit hardware  to its limits.
We're also excited to announce a publishing deal through WOW! So Limited Games! Their team has been working closely with us up until release day to make sure the standard physical cartridge release and then limited edition physical collector's edition of space threnody are everything our fans want them to be. You can place your pre-order here!
inputs:
X - (A) Interact  C - (B) Shift / cancelV - (Start) Pause gameB - (Select) Change weaponsArrow keys - (D-pad) Move, turn
(While holding B)
Up - ReloadDown - Quick turnLeft/right - Strafe
More control information on pause menu in-game.
Known issues:
Start menu doesn't tell you how to reloadOccasional soft-lock when turning away from enemiesCollectible counter at level end doesn't reset when restarting
credits:
writing, music, gilmore girls expertaustinbrook
environment artvictor caveda
game programmingjackie fishervictoria lacroix
gun sommelierjane underscore
copywriter and publisher liaisonbluesturngold
a sequel to 2021's fallstar
EDIT: Hey Team Slime fans! Our sincerest apologies to those who pre-ordered a physical copy of space threnody through WOW! So Limited. If you aren't part of our mailing list, you may have missed news of their sudden closure. We have nothing but love and well wishes for the former employees who are searching for new positions right now. Just an update on where we're at with refunds, since some of you have been asking and we want to be as transparent as possible... communication with their CEO has broken down, so we are currently reviewing our legal options. Our legal advisor says we can't share anything further at this time just to maintain the integrity of our case, but we'll let you know when there is more we can say. In the meantime, we encourage you to enjoy the digital release of space threnody!

game.title: The Brainvore
game.short_text: Brainvore is a spooky survival adventure made for the GB-Jam 12

details.title: The Brainvore
details.description:
This game was made for the GB-Jam 12  
by  Fina (Visual Artist), Chaz O. (Composer) and Aelexaender (Programmer) The year is 2240 you are an officer aboard the UESS Humboldt a ship in the fleet of the United Earth Space Agency.  
You and your crew are currently on the way home from a survey mission  to the Proxima Centauri system. Your science officers found some  organic material on one of the planets and you are now tasked with  returning those samples to Sol. 
    
Something seems to have gone wrong. When you wake up your bunk  mate is gone. You also can't seem to find anyone else. At least anyone  that still breaths.
    
If you are having performance issues inside the web page, consider   downloading the game for Linux or Windows it should run way better on  your local  computer.Instructions: 
In the option menu you can adjust the volume of the sound and music
Full Controller Support 
In the Menu Press Space/A (controller) to select an option
Game Boy Keys Legend: 
W / A / S / D Up / Left / Down / Right = D-Pad     

Space = A (interact)
Shift / K= B (shoot)
Tab = Select (Open Interactive Map)
ESC = Start (Open Fancy Map)

You use Left and Right turn and Up and Down to move.
You can interact with object and doors by pressing A.
After you found a gun you can shoot by Pressing B.

ControlGame=== Keyboard ====== Gamepad ===[D-Pad](Move)WASD, Arrow KeysSticks, D-Pad[A](Jump)Z, J, SpaceA[B](Split)X, K, QB[START](Pause)C, L, E, EnterStart[SELECT](Retry)V, ;, RBack

Activates...Passes Through...Destroys...Stopped by...Killed by...GhostElectrical switches and plugsPermeable walls; SpikesSpidersReligious sigilsFlames, Lanterns, FireballsZombieLevers and buttonsReligious sigils; FlamesLanterns, FireballsPermeable wallsSpikes, SpidersCombinedEverythingNothingNothingEverythingEverything

Collect the candy to finish the game.
[ Completion time: 20-30 minutes ][ Options, records, and level completion progress is saved. The player's current level is not saved. ]



Grief & Garbage
Originally created in 10 days for GBJAM 12.

Thank you, the participants of GBJAM 12, for voting Grief & Garbage #11 overall. You are a community flush with proficiency, creativity, and hard work, and I am deeply humbled that you voted our game so highly. It is especially humbling to receive the #1 Gameplay vote in a competition with so many excellent mechanical experiences. It was an honor to develop with you all.
Happy Halloween!

= Developer & Writer =Clark Padmore


= Duo Platformer Concept =Joyce
= Additional Design =Joyce
= Testers =Joyce & Wilson
= GBJAM 12 Logo =Batfuela

Chiptune created using DefleMask
Made with GDevelop 5.4

=== Pre-existing code ===
Grief & Garbage was built using large sections of pre-existing general functionality. This includes:Deltatiming logicUnified input systemTouch control systemText sprite systemMenu systemOptions systemColor palette systemBasic save/loadDebug / Frame-by-frame systemBasic scene switchBasic platformer characterMost of the dialogue systemEvent script system    By Clark Padmore
=== Exempted pre-existing assets ===
"TextCharacter" sprite font, as outlined by the font exception.The "Clark Padmore" logo and jingle, as outlined by the splash logo exception.    By Clark Padmore


The GBJAM 12 logo, as outlined by the permission to use it from the jam page.    By Batfuela
All other assets, including assets associated with pre-existing systems (touch control, menu, dialogue), were created during the duration of the jam.
Special thanks to the organizers and moderators of GBJAM 12 for providing this opportunity to create and to share.
Special thanks to my dear family for their undying love and support.
© Clark Padmore 2024Generative artificial intelligence programs and features (genAI) were purposefully avoided and not used in the production of this software. This includes all phases of conceptualization, research, development, marketing, and publication. I value intentional design as a method of quality and a praxis of life.

game.title: Canary
game.short_text: Precision platformer with micro-metroidvania elements

details.title: Canary
details.description:
Note: game may not load on newest version of Safari. Please use Chrome. Thanks!
Made for GBJam 12
--------------------------------------------------
Escape the Depths
In 1911, coal miners began using sacrificial canaries to detect deadly gases. The birds, more sensitive to toxins, would show distress or die, warning miners to evacuate before gas levels became lethal. Though this practice has now ended, the spirits of canaries from abandoned coal mines still seek their final rest. 
--------------------------------------------------
Objective
Dodge and avoid the toxic gases and mysterious eyeballs to obtain a total of 5 feathers from other fallen canaries and escape the mines. Good luck!
--------------------------------------------------
Controls
W A S D or Arrow Keys - move and look
K or Z - jump
J or X - claim grave
O - change palette for fun!
P - pause and stats
--------------------------------------------------
Post your best times when you reach the goal!
--------------------------------------------------
Tools used:
Game Engine: Godot 4.3Art: PixakiMusic and SFX: Bosca Ceoil - The Blue Album and JFXRPalette Overlay Shader by datagoblin (https://datagoblin.itch.io/)
Stuck? Video playthrough:

game.title: Curse of Aterwood Manor
game.short_text: Will you escape the mansion's grasp or become a part of its haunted legacy?

details.title: Curse of Aterwood Manor
details.description:
Controls
To Move: Arrows or WASD
A button (interact): E or J
B button (attack): C or L
Start: Enter
Select: Shift
Taking notes is recommended.
---------------------------
In "Curse of Aterwood Manor" you play as Detective Elias Aterwood, who inherits a mysterious, abandoned mansion rumored to be haunted.
As you explore its eerie halls, you discover an empty painting in the mansion's scriptorium. To unlock the secrets of the mansion and its ghostly inhabitants, you must collect painting pieces scattered across rooms, each tied to the spirits of the previous residents. 
Along the way, you'll solve puzzles, confront apparitions, and unravel the tragic fate of the family. But as the truth unfolds, so does your own connection to the curse. Will you escape the mansion's grasp or become a part of its haunted legacy?

Team:
Programmer, Level Designer, and Artist: https://jyken.itch.io/
Composer: https://forcy.itch.io/
Artist: https://momongaa.itch.io/
Narrative & Level Designer, Artist and Programmer: https://rtfxstudio.itch.io/

The manor music was inspired by "In the Hall of the Mountain King" by Edvard Grieg and the ending music was inspired by "Moonlight Sonata" by Ludwig van Beethoven.

This game is playable on Game Boy Color or any emulator that uses .gbc files! 
Made with GB Studio for the GB JAM 12!
---------------------------
Known bugs: -If you're stuck at the harp puzzle, you have to use B > Down > A to get out as the choice dialogue doesn't show up. (The answer to the puzzle is Mi Do Mi So Mi Ti)
Fixed in version 1.1
-The loading of the painting pieces can be inconsistent. If they do not update correctly when finding new pieces, try going back and looking at the painting a second time. ( in case it still doesn't load you can see the full painting below)
Fixed in version 1.1
Thanks for playing !
Full Music Soundtrack:

Keyboard Controls:Movement: Arrow Keys or W, A, S and DJump: Z, J or AltWhip: X, K or CtrlShuriken: Up + WhipOpen Treasure Chests: UpPause: Enter
Controller Controls:Movement : D-PadJump: A / CircleWhip: B / CrossShuriken: Up + WhipOpen Treasure Chests: UpPause: StartYou can also download the ROM below, but you will need an emulator to play it, I recommend BGB: https://bgb.bircd.org/
Post Jam Note: I've decided that the browser version is going to remain the initial 1.0 release, which has a bug which can disable player damage from enemy collisions if certain conditions are met, I made that decision to preserve the state in which the game was initially submitted to the GBJAM 12.On that note, I strongly recommend downloading the fixed ROM below and playing that instead.I'm also working on a colour version of the game which has no lag and a small amount of extra content, I'll post it and link it here as soon as it's done.I've also decided to accept donations for the game if anyone is so inclined, thank you very much in advance!Also thanks to everyone who's played and rated the game during the jam period!
(13/9/2024 - 23:34 UTC) Note: Currently the Browser version is the original game as it was submitted to the Jam, however the ROM is a small bugfix update. Please judge the game for the Jam by the Browser version, and enjoy the fixed ROM at your leisure later!

game.title: Doomslinger Dungeon
game.short_text: A first-person  dungeon-crawling rougue-lite shooter for the Game Boy.

details.title: Doomslinger Dungeon
details.description:
A spookyfirst-person dungeon-crawlingrougue-liteshooterfor the Game Boy 



My entry for GBJAM 12 
This game was originally built within 10 days during the game jam. This includes the creation of all assets. It placed 8th of around 400 submissions.



There were next to no first-person shooters on the original Game Boy. So, I wanted to change that :)

 

Play as the Doomslinger, a mysterious gunslinger. Venture into a creepy dungeon and defeat all kinds of spooky monsters like ghosts, zombies and pumpkin monsters.



How to Play
If the web player does not play any sound or respond to your inputs, click into the web player area once again with your mouse.



Play the Latest Version
After the game jam I have updated the game. I'm going to keep the submitted version online, if you are curious what the game looked like when it was submitted. In any other case you should probably play the most recent version. 
If you are interested in what changed since the game jam and what are my future ideas and plans for this game, please read my devlogs. I'm looking forward to your feedback.

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 4.7 out of 5 stars(21 total ratings)
moreInfo.Author: playinstinct

game.title: DeadLine
game.short_text: Don't you hate it when you're alone in your room and you feel that someone is watching you

details.title: DeadLine
details.description:
Ever get the feeling of being watched while your alone by a window at night, You stop what your doing to look outside but can't see anything?  
Step into the shoes of an art student who didn't get their assignments done on time and needs to pull an all-nighter to get it all done before the deadline. Alone working on their assignments a creeping sense of unease fills them as they look towards the window. Is there something out there? Is it watching them?  Will they be able to get their work done on time while surviving the night?Find out in this mash up drawing and horror game, where you must get your work done while keeping an eye out for what lurks just out of sight. 
INSTRUCTIONS
Draw on the canvas according to the details of the assignment by using the cursor to move the pencil around. You can do this in drawing mode, but while in this mode you are vulnerable to the monsters outside the window.  Switching into room mode so that you turn the lights on and off to see outside. If you see the monster close the blinds so that it can no longer see you causing it to momentarily go away. Take too long to check on it and close the blinds and the monster will start hitting the glass breaking it. But don't leave the blinds closed too long.If the monster hits the glass 4 times it will enter the room. 
CONTROLS (Keyboard)
"E" > press or hold in drawing mode to color spaces, close/ open blinds in room mode"Q" >  Erase in Drawing mode, Turn off Lights in Room Mode "W, A, S, D" > Move cursor around screen, move options in menus"Space " > Switch between Room and Drawing mode "Tab " > Open the pause menu to look at the assignment again/ see options in the menu
TEAM
Meansofa | sparrow6550 | global_xi | Rhi (@Digipaw1 ) | PlayerXYZ | muhakun1001

game.title: Crazy Cauldron
game.short_text: Gbjam 12 Submission

details.title: Crazy Cauldron
details.description:
A ghost stole your potion ingredients. Show the inhabitants of the haunted castle next door that you're not a witch to mess with.
Crazy Cauldron is a combat platformer about throwing enemies into your cauldron to assemble spells. Stun enemies with your broom or your spells, throw them in your cauldron (or your cauldron at them), then stir up more magic. But beware - freaky sludgemen, eyeballs, bats, spiders, and more will try to stop you from getting your valuable ingredients back! Will they stop you in your tracks, or will they become ingredients in your evil brew?
MESS WITH THE CRONE, PREPARE TO GET OWNED.
CONTROLS:
  Left and right arrow keys move you around. 
  Press Z to jump in a fixed arc. Press Z in midair to mount your broom to get some more height and readjust your jump.
  X swings your broom to whack beasties. If you have a spell equipped, it also launches the spell. It can knock around stunned enemies.
  Down picks up stunned enemies. If you're holding an enemy, hit X to throw them, or down again to drop them.
  Shift summons your cauldron if it's offscreen. It appears in your hands, so you can throw it immediately.
  Up lets you stir your cauldron. When you do, you can choose a new spell to equip. Hit Z to select a spell.
TIPS:
  Stunned enemies can get back up after a while, so act fast! 
  When you select a spell, you get mana based on how many enemies your cauldron ate. Four's the max, but if you get all four, you can access a powerful healing spell.
  Each spell has its benefits. Fireball is fast and hits hard. Homing Bolt isn't the strongest, but it homes in on enemies. Bubble is cheap and can hit areas above you that are challenging to whack with your broom. Experiment and see what works!
  The HAND will chase you if you don't get away from it quick enough. Either take it out or outrun it -- but beware, it's a better jumper than you are.
  You can use your broom to access platforms you can't quite jump up to.
  Hitting enemies with other enemies will deal some damage in a pinch.

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 5.0 out of 5 stars(1 total ratings)
moreInfo.Author: Salivaried

game.title: Xyndrahe
game.short_text: Drakhe travels to a mysterious island to uncover the secrets behind a pumpkin, costumes and candy.

details.title: Xyndrahe
details.description:
There have been a couple concerns posted regarding survival problems. Here are a few tips to help stay alive.
After purchasing equipment, make sure you go to the menu, select 'ITEMS' and hit left/right to move the selection boxes over to the sword and shield.  This will boost your STR and DEF and allow you to be more effective against enemies.Farm your way up to level 3 before you worry about leaving the first 'world' area on the map.Your first goal should be to head west (past the mansion) and explore the caves. You will find a key in there that will help lead you to your first artifact.
On a distant island resides a god that no one has ever seen.  His name is Torrochi and has suppressed many of the old traditions of an older god named Xyndrahe who disappeared long ago. One such tradition, while it is rumor, involved the use of pumpkins, costumes and candy, but no one seems to understand what this all means and why they were related to one another.
Enter Drakhe, a young and aspiring adventurer. 
He sets out on a ship to reach the island and learn of the old traditions of Xyndrahe, but what he finds on the island is not what he expected.
Xyndrahe is a RPG featuring bump mechanics; you 'literally' run into the enemy to damage them, though there is strategy behind this method. A direct, frontal assault is most likely to harm the player in the process. Off-center attacks greatly reduces the chances of being attacked and a side/back attack will allow him to attack without being harmed.

  
Game Details

File Size204 kb
GenreBump Action RPG
ThemesGB JAM #12: Hallowe'en* The different monsters around the world map, haunted house, tales of a festive activity that involves pumpkins, candy and costumes, the list goes on.
Resolution 160 x 144
Palettes* 1x 4-colour active palette. Options page allows the player to select from a range of pre-included palettes.
Sound/Music*4-channel sound limit with 1 channel on noise.
Input Support* Keyboard * Touch Screen * Controller 

How to Play



KeyboardSet1
KeyboardSet2
KeyboardSet3
Touch Controls
Description

Arrow KeysWASDWASDDirectional PadMove Drakhe

ZXJXA BUTTON* Examine chest* Talk to NPC* Open door

XCKOB BUTTON* Use item (selected in 'ITEMS' when accessing the menu).

ENTER
+
START BUTTON* Access menu.

SHIFT-SELECT BUTTON


Changes to the keyboard set will not take place until after the player leaves the OPTIONS page.
The default setup when playing for the first time is Keyboard Set 1. If this is an issue, the touch screen buttons can be controlled with a mouse to allow a player access to the OPTIONS page and change the setup to one of the WASD options.
Navigate Drakhe around the island, locate three special artifacts and bring them to Torrochi's temple for the final confrontation.
Menu
Press START to bring up the menu. This can also be done to pause the game.

ITEMS - Organize which equipment and items you want to have on-hand. This will affect your equipped sword, shield, ring and which item you can use while on the field (By pressing the B button).LOAD - Load a previously saved game.SAVE - Save your game. This can be done anywhere except when fighting a boss.RETURN - Back to the game.QUIT - You can return to the main menu.
Towns
Talk to NPCs and get information on what is going on and clues to where to look for artifacts.Shop at the stores for items and equipment upgrades. Be sure to bring plenty of funds.Visit the shrine and have the servants of Torrochi recover your health (free of charge).
Overworld
Navigate the overworld and engage enemies to collect experience to build your levels and character strengths.
Dungeons / Caves
Many locations have locked doors which require a key and treasure chests to open and collect items from.  Monsters are (typically) more dangerous in caves than on the overworld.
Equipment

NameDescription
Short Sword100+5 Attack Power
Broad Sword500+15 Attack Power
Cleaver1500+30 Attack Power
Slayer4000+45 Attack Power
Heroic Sword---+60 Attack Power
Small Shield100+5 Defense Power
Medium Shield400+15 Defense Power
Large Shield1200+30 Defense Power
Y-Cross Shield3200+45 Defense Power
Brave Shield---+60 Defense Power
Protect Ring---Reduces Damage Taken
Power Ring---Increases Damage Dealt
Healer Ring---Increases HP Recovery
Potion50HP +40
Potion2250HP +80
Potion31000Full HP
Wing100Warp to Bradport
Mansion Key---Opens the Mansion door.
Scary Key---Opens a door inside the mansion.
Castle Key---Opens a door inside the castle.
Cave Key---Opens a door inside the final cave.
Demon Key---Opens a door inside the final cave.
Lantern---Special artifact.
Costume---Special artifact.
Candy---Special artifact.

Donators
Pizza Doggy
Latest Updates
Version 1.02, Build 1 -- July 7th, 2025 
Fixed an issue that can cause the game to run slow on Firefox 110+
Re-wrote the game's HOW TO PLAY a little bit so it's easier to read.110+
Edited a few source tiles.

Version 1.02 -- July 2nd, 2025 
Controller support has been added.
Options page can be accessed from the game menu.
The ITEMS page now includes all the special items the player collects along the way.
Made some minor changes to the source tiles.
An unfinished boss music has been completed and now plays during the final boss battle.
Fixed a few tile placements, sprites, choices in words used in dialogue; mostly just cleanup.
Fixed an issue where it was possible to prematurely open the gate to the final boss. Of course, without sufficient level and equipment, the player would not last long.
Fixed an issue in the game menu where pressing up/down while given the option to quit the game would place the cursor in an unusual spot on the screen.
Version 1.01, Build 1 -- March 16th, 2025
Fixed an issue that 'could' impact the frame rate of the game.
Version 1.01 -- October 17th, 2024
Found a few more badly placed tiles in one town and the first forest and fixed them.Found the issue that was causing the smallest of stuttering to occur while Drakhe was moving around on the map. The animation should feel much smoother, now.While more of a backend update, some code was changed around to help optimize how fast the game can draw content on the screen.Shops have been given a bit more personality. You can now talk to the shopkeeps to learn some information about the island.
Version 1.00, Build 2 -- October 15th, 2024
Apparently during the last update, much of the title screen concept was broken. It now works as it should. I also shortened the Jam splash screen so the title screen pops up faster.
Version 1.00, Build 1 -- October 7th, 2024
Fixed several problems with the map layout, including some bad tiles and warp positions within the second town (They would still take you to and from town, but...).Updated the music for the 2nd dungeon (the castle).Updated and fixed the touchpad and other two keyboard controls so combat will properly work for them.
Version 1.00 -- September 23rd, 2024
Project has been uploaded to Itch.

game.title: GRAVE ESCAPE
game.short_text: Escape a graveyard as a ghost to haunt a mansion on a halloween night!

details.title: GRAVE ESCAPE
details.description:
This game was developed for the GB JAM 12!
You're a GHOST. Your main ability? POSSESSING CREATURES! As a ghost you can't be hurt by most things, but at the same time you may not be able to interact with some mechanics, taking the body of a mortal creature might allow you to interact with the physical realm, but at the same time it will make you vulnerable! Use your powers to solve small puzzles to escape from the graveyard.
This is a short and sweet game, I hope you enjoy it :)
IMPORTANT: This game can be played on your browser, but there's also a .gbc ROM available, this ROM can be used on Gameboy Emulators that support Gameboy Color, you can also use this on official hardware, of course.

game.title: Unloved Blessing (2024)
game.short_text: Oswald seeks his wife in a medieval church seized by a cult. Stealth, explore, survive!

details.title: Unloved Blessing (2024)
details.description:
Transformed into a monstrous being, Oswald finds himself trapped in a medieval church by a dangerous cult. Led by a deranged 'Pope', the cult seeks to use Oswald as a vessel to communicate with the outer god, Yog-Sothoth. Driven by the love for his wife, Theodora, Oswald must navigate through dimly lit corridors and avoid detection by patrolling monks.

  
  

Utilize your newfound abilities to intimidate and outsmart these not-so-clever cultists. As you search for Theodora and uncover grim truths, every decision brings you closer to freedom or eternal bondage. Will you escape their clutches, or succumb to the horrific fate they have in store?


  
  

Development
Crafted for GBJAM 12 which second theme is "Spooky", "Unloved Blessing" combines atmospheric storytelling with engaging gameplay. Immerse yourself in this 2D top-down adventure inspired by the works of H.P. Lovecraft and the question what would happen if the Necronomicon were found in a medieval age by a dangerous religious person.
Credits

Music and Texts: Akari Momose
Programming, Design and Story: Javier Garcia

moreInfo.Tags: Game Boy, GBJam, Lovecraftian Horror, Medieval, Spooky

game.title: Ana
game.short_text: Platformer with a f(r)iend

details.title: Ana
details.description:
Just your average platformer, with a friend you meet along the way.
Many control options for accessibility.Walk:  WASD / arrows or controller d-pad / joystickRun: Double Press WalkJump: Space / X / Right click / controller south buttonAll original art, music, and code. Built in Godot 4.3.
We started with a different idea about working in a haunted video store, but we all watched Ring together and went this direction instead. We didn't quite get to finish it to the point that we'd like, but there's a bunch of good creepiness to experience in the current state anyway. We had a ton of fun with this jam!
